text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm taking a stroll through the forest, when...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh, heh. I've finally found it! The phantom
mushroom that grows only in this forest!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations! Oh, here, I brought a bag for
you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, uh, thank you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And here are some wet tissues! You can clean the
dirt off your hands with these.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...My, what a wonderful little assistant you are.
But is there a reason you've followed me all the
way here?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Well, I saw you walking around campus, and you
looked tired and a little out of it, so...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I thought maybe there was something I could do
to help... Am I getting in your way?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. In fact, I'm grateful you're here! I
should give you something as thanks.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Please, you don't need to do anything like that!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Modesty may be a virtue, but restraint is not...
You want to become an independent adult, don't
you?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? How did you know that?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Perfect. Then I'll make you a special
concoction from this mushroom.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It will enhance the growth hormones secreted
during sleep, thus helping you become an adult
faster.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um... that sounds very complicated, but... I'm not
sure if it's exactly what I'm looking for...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A healthy body is key to a healthy mind... Why
not try starting with the body first?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, okay!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmph... What terrible timing for a call. Hello?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...The student council has received an anonymous
tip, and they're going to conduct an inspection of
my lab? This is not good.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Yep. Well, that should do it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sky? What brings you here?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, fancy running into you here, Flower.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I was just taking a nap in a field nearby. Wanna
head back together?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Uh, sure!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure Sky was on the phone just now... but who
could she have been calling out here in the
middle of the forest?
